sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 285 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.22, 25 & 26. 2. For orders on CMA No.327/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.04.2026 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel presses only question at (a), however, is unable to demonstrable how it is material to the case. In any event he seeks to re- agitate the facts of the case, for which the learned Appellate Tribunal is the last forum in the statutory hierarchy. Since no question of law has been articulated, therefore, reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
